title: Minor typo noticed when reading podman man page
body:
It reads "ashort-name" when it should read "a short-name" when viewing
via man. It's missing a space. Also removed some duplicate spaces.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
